phrases.intent_en: Ask if marked paths are mandatory
phrases.cultural_note: Stromovka is a protected landscape and cultural monument zone where staying on marked paths is enforced by nature guards.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, you must in the monument zone.

responses.english: Yes, you must in the monument zone.

phrases.cultural_note: The Výstaviště exhibition ground borders Stromovka Park and is separated by a ship canal, accessible from Veletržní street.

likely_response.local: Za průplavem, u vchodu z Veletržní.
likely_response.translation_en: Beyond the canal, by the Veletržní entrance.

responses.english: Beyond the canal, by the Veletržní entrance.
responses.local: Za průplavem, u vchodu z Veletržní.

phrases.cultural_note: The Prague Planetarium in Stromovka is accessed from the park side, near the Academy of Fine Arts building.

likely_response.translation_en: Behind the Academy of Fine Arts.

responses.english: Behind the Academy of Fine Arts.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to pay Centrum Stromovka parking
phrases.text_local: Jak zaplatím parkování u Centra Stromovka?
phrases.cultural_note: Parking at Czech shopping centers is usually paid at automated machines before returning to your car.

likely_response.local: V automatu na parkovišti, kartou nebo mincemi.
likely_response.translation_en: At the parking machine, by card or coins.

responses.english: At the parking machine, by card or coins.
responses.local: V automatu na parkovišti, kartou nebo mincemi.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if bike rental is open now
phrases.cultural_note: Bike rentals near parks in Czech cities often operate seasonally and close in the evening.
